context: Tests that the agent designs a CI integration using the validation script and explains exit codes (0/1/2), the checks performed (syntax, formatting, security, .PHONY), and produces a local validation target.

checklist.name: Validation script referenced
checklist.description: The GitHub Actions workflow or setup-guide.md references bash scripts/validate_makefile.sh (or the validation script) as the validation tool

checklist.name: Exit codes documented
checklist.description: setup-guide.md documents the three exit codes: 0 (no issues), 1 (warnings), 2 (errors) — or equivalent pass/warn/fail semantics

checklist.name: CI workflow triggers on Makefile changes
checklist.description: The GitHub Actions workflow is triggered on pull_request and includes a paths filter for Makefile or *.mk files

checklist.name: Checks explained
checklist.description: setup-guide.md lists at least three categories of issues the validation catches (e.g., tab indentation, .PHONY, hardcoded credentials, syntax errors)

checklist.name: Self-validating Makefile target
checklist.description: Makefile.snippet includes a 'validate' or 'lint' target that runs the validation script

checklist.name: Validate target is .PHONY
checklist.description: The validate/lint target in Makefile.snippet is declared in .PHONY

checklist.name: Local run instructions
checklist.description: setup-guide.md explains how to run validation locally (the command to use)

checklist.name: Input Makefile issues noted
checklist.description: The setup-guide.md or workflow output notes issues in the provided example-bad-makefile.mk (spaces, missing .PHONY, bare make call)
